mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cat_mesh_entry_combination ( id, descriptor_id, ecin_descriptor_ui, ecin_qualifier_ui, ecout_descriptor_ui, ecout_qualifier_ui, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.descriptorId}, #{item.ecinDescriptorUi}, #{item.ecinQualifierUi}, #{item.ecoutDescriptorUi}, #{item.ecoutQualifierUi}, 0, NOW(6), NOW(6), 0 )
